name: painfully-jupyter
description: Operate remote notebook sessions from Codex through Painfully Jupyter.

interface.shortDescription: Set up and use remote notebook sessions through a broker-backed MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Painfully Jupyter helps Codex pair with a helper process inside a cloud notebook, upload allowlisted project files, run commands, stream output, write stdin, and fetch artifacts through a user-hosted broker.
defaultPrompt: Use the Painfully Jupyter remote notebook skill to set up and operate a remote notebook session.
